input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.6.1
            TITLE: the only items allowed forward of the anti intrusion plate in front view are the impact

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.6.1: The only items allowed forward of the Anti Intrusion Plate in front view are the Impact
F.8.6.1 The only items allowed forward of the Anti Intrusion Plate in front view are the Impact 
Attenuator, fastener heads, and light bodywork / nosecones 
Fasteners should be oriented with the nuts rearwards

final_answer: rule F.8.6.1: The only items allowed forward of the Anti Intrusion Plate in front view are the Impact Attenuator, fastener heads, and light bodywork / nosecones Fasteners should be oriented with the nuts rearwards
